title: Better Head Holding
description: Changes the position of heads in first person to be able to see them better.
body:
[![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/JiW4MLF.png)](https://discord.gg/PJCXjSJnu2)

# Better Head Holding

This resource pack changes the position of heads in first person to be able to see them better.

![](https://i.imgur.com/1WtQM6T.png)
